title: FLOSS Weekly 336: deviationTx
summary:
Randal Schwartz and Guillermo Amaral talk with Mike Meyer and Geoffrey Hausheer about deviationTx. Deviation is a replacement firmware designed primarily for the Walkera Devo® series RC Transmitters.
Download or subscribe to this show at https://twit.tv/shows/floss-weekly.
Thanks to CacheFly for providing the bandwidth for this podcast, and Lullabot's Jeff Robbins, web designer and musician, for our theme music.
